$comment: L4 machine registry — the shared-feature graph for RaSi Fiters. Empty until the first feature is documented via question-asker + committed via git-version. Each feature: { version, spec, status, consumed_by, depends_on, reference_impl: { app, paths } }. consumed_by lists which apps use it: ['web','ios'] (shared), ['web'] (web-only), or ['ios'] (ios-only). status: documented|built|deployed|retired. version is a label (semver) tracked here + in the SPEC Changelog + a git tag feature/<name>@vX.Y.Z — there are NO per-version folders. Page/screen specs are tracked separately in specs/pages/REGISTRY.md.
